classes.label: Education Record
classes.description: A record containing educational background information of an individual.
evidence: Group summary mentions fields: 学历码、所学专业码、结束学业年月、毕肄业学校或单位、学历证书号、获得学位码、授学位单位名称、授学位国家/地区码、获学位专业码、获学位日期、学位证书号

classes.label: Family Information
classes.description: Information regarding an individual's family members and household details.
evidence: Group summary mentions fields: 家庭住址, 家庭邮政编码, 家庭电话, 家庭电子信箱, 关系码, 成员姓名, 出生年月, 成员工作单位, 从业码, 专业技术职务码, 职务级别码, 联系人姓名, 家庭人口, 赡养人口, 劳动力人口, 家庭人均月收入, 家庭主要收入来源, 家庭类别码, 困难原因码

classes.label: Degree
classes.description: An academic degree awarded to an individual.
evidence: Fields: 获得学位码, 授学位单位名称, 授学位国家/地区码, 获学位专业码, 获学位日期, 学位证书号

classes.label: School or Institution
classes.description: An educational or research institution where an individual studied or from which they received a degree.
evidence: Fields: 毕肄业学校或单位, 授学位单位名称

classes.label: Family Member
classes.description: A member of an individual's family.
evidence: Fields: 关系码, 成员姓名, 出生年月, 成员工作单位, 从业码, 专业技术职务码, 职务级别码

classes.label: Contact Information
classes.description: Contact details for an individual or their family.
evidence: Fields: 家庭住址, 家庭邮政编码, 家庭电话, 家庭电子信箱, 联系人姓名

classes.label: Major or Specialty
classes.description: A field of study or academic major.
evidence: Fields: 所学专业码, 获学位专业码

classes.label: Certificate
classes.description: A document certifying an achievement, such as a degree or completion of studies.
evidence: Fields: 学历证书号, 学位证书号

datatype_properties.label: Education Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the level of education.
evidence: Record JCTB020504: 学历码

datatype_properties.label: Major Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the major or specialty studied.
evidence: Record JCTB020505: 所学专业码 - 取得学历所学习的专业码

datatype_properties.label: End Date of Study
datatype_properties.description: The year and month when studies ended.
evidence: Record JCTB020506: 结束学业年月

datatype_properties.label: School or Institution Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the school or institution.
evidence: Record JCTB020507: 毕肄业学校或单位 - 从事学历教育并获得证书的毕肄业学校或科研单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Education Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the education certificate.
evidence: Record JCTB020508: 学历证书号

datatype_properties.label: Degree Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the degree obtained.
evidence: Record JCTB020509: 获得学位码

datatype_properties.label: Degree Awarding Institution Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the institution that awarded the degree.
evidence: Record JCTB020510: 授学位单位名称 - 颁发学位证书的单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Degree Awarding Country or Region Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the country or region where the degree was awarded.
evidence: Record JCTB020511: 授学位国家/地区码

datatype_properties.label: Degree Major Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the major of the degree obtained.
evidence: Record JCTB020512: 获学位专业码 - 取得学历所学习的专业码

datatype_properties.label: Degree Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the degree was obtained, based on the issuance date of the degree certificate.
evidence: Record JCTB020513: 获学位日期 - 以学位证书的签发日期为准

datatype_properties.label: Degree Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the degree certificate.
evidence: Record JCTB020514: 学位证书号

datatype_properties.label: Home Address
datatype_properties.description: Home address of the individual.
evidence: Record JCTB020601: 家庭住址

datatype_properties.label: Home Postal Code
datatype_properties.description: Postal code of the home address.
evidence: Record JCTB020602: 家庭邮政编码

datatype_properties.label: Home Phone
datatype_properties.description: Home phone number.
evidence: Record JCTB020603: 家庭电话

datatype_properties.label: Home Email
datatype_properties.description: Home email address.
evidence: Record JCTB020604: 家庭电子信箱

datatype_properties.label: Relationship Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the relationship of the family member to the individual.
evidence: Record JCTB020701: 关系码

datatype_properties.label: Family Member Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the family member.
evidence: Record JCTB020702: 成员姓名

datatype_properties.label: Family Member Birth Date
datatype_properties.description: Birth date of the family member.
evidence: Record JCTB020703: 出生年月

datatype_properties.label: Family Member Work Unit
datatype_properties.description: Work unit of the family member.
evidence: Record JCTB020704: 成员工作单位 - 家庭成员工作的单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Occupation Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the occupation of the family member.
evidence: Record JCTB020705: 从业码

datatype_properties.label: Professional Title Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the professional title of the family member.
evidence: Record JCTB020706: 专业技术职务码

datatype_properties.label: Position Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the position level of the family member.
evidence: Record JCTB020707: 职务级别码

datatype_properties.label: Contact Person Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the contact person.
evidence: Record JCTB020801: 联系人姓名

datatype_properties.label: Family Population
datatype_properties.description: Number of people in the family household.
evidence: Record JCTB020901: 家庭人口 - 指本人家庭户口人口数

datatype_properties.label: Dependent Population
datatype_properties.description: Number of dependents the individual supports financially.
evidence: Record JCTB020902: 赡养人口 - 指本人(家庭)经济上负担赡养的人口数

datatype_properties.label: Labor Force Population
datatype_properties.description: Number of labor force members in the family.
evidence: Record JCTB020903: 劳动力人口 - 指家庭劳动力人口数

datatype_properties.label: Family Per Capita Monthly Income
datatype_properties.description: Average monthly income per person in the family.
evidence: Record JCTB020904: 家庭人均月收入 - 家庭月均人收入

datatype_properties.label: Main Family Income Source
datatype_properties.description: Main source of income for the family.
evidence: Record JCTB020905: 家庭主要收入来源 - 家庭主要收入来源

datatype_properties.label: Family Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code categorizing the family.
evidence: Record JCTB020906: 家庭类别码

datatype_properties.label: Difficulty Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code indicating the reason for family difficulty.
evidence: Record JCTB020907: 困难原因码

object_properties.label: has Degree
object_properties.description: An education record includes a degree obtained.
evidence: Degree-related fields are part of the education record group.

object_properties.label: awarded By
object_properties.description: The degree was awarded by a specific institution.
evidence: Record JCTB020510: 授学位单位名称

object_properties.label: studied At
object_properties.description: The individual studied at a specific school or institution.
evidence: Record JCTB020507: 毕肄业学校或单位

object_properties.label: has Major
object_properties.description: The education record includes a major or specialty.
evidence: Record JCTB020505: 所学专业码

object_properties.label: degree In Major
object_properties.description: The degree was obtained in a specific major.
evidence: Record JCTB020512: 获学位专业码

object_properties.label: has Education Certificate
object_properties.description: The education record includes an education certificate.
evidence: Record JCTB020508: 学历证书号

object_properties.label: has Degree Certificate
object_properties.description: The degree includes a degree certificate.
evidence: Record JCTB020514: 学位证书号

object_properties.label: has Family Member
object_properties.description: The family information includes a family member.
evidence: Family member fields are part of the family information group.

object_properties.label: has Contact Info
object_properties.description: The family information includes contact details.
evidence: Contact info fields are part of the family information group.
